_doc: Founder-OS single source of truth. All UI pages (home, roadmap, projects, tasks, kpis) bind into this file via $state pointers. Fields prefixed with `_doc` or `_doc_` are documentation for the agent — they are ignored by the UI. Do not rename top-level keys. Append-only events go to *.jsonl files. When uncertain about a field, ask the user before writing.
_doc_here_invariant: INVARIANT: `here: true` MUST appear at exactly ONE node across the entire roadmap.phases[*].subs[*] tree. Before setting `here: true` on a new sub, you MUST set/leave `here: false` (or remove the key) on every other sub. Treat this as a hard agent rule — never let two `here: true` exist at the same time.

data._doc_business_profile: Captured during onboarding Q1-Q5. Immutable after onboarding unless explicitly changed by user. product_description / problem_solved / customer_description come from Q5 (free-text parsed into three parts). elevator_pitch holds Q5 verbatim. pmf_substage only set when current_path = 'pmf' (Q3a). gtm_substage only set when current_path = 'gtm' (Q3b).
data._doc_focus: Captured during onboarding Q6-Q8. Updated whenever user reframes priorities (e.g. in Quarterly Rebuild). today = full Q6 answer verbatim. revenue_today / team_size_today / status_one_liner = parsed from Q6 if extractable. goal_12m and milestone_90d are STRUCTURED OBJECTS (Q7) with revenue_target / customer_count_target / team_size_target / qualitative_goals[] / raw_text — populate what the user gives, leave the rest null. raw_text is always populated.
data._doc_current_path: One of: 'pmf' | 'gtm' | 'scale'. Routed during onboarding from business_profile + focus answers. Switched only via explicit Path Switch flow (see SKILL.md).
data._doc_path_state: Path-scoped state for the active path. Replaces the legacy pmf-state.md frontmatter.
data._doc_path_state_archive: Preserved path_state from previous paths after a path switch. Keyed by path name (e.g. 'pmf'). Never written to during normal operation.
data._doc_currentFocus: ONE sentence. The single outcome that defines success this phase. Max ~80 chars. No lists, no commas-as-bullets.
data._doc_bottleneck: What is currently blocking progress. title = ≤6 words. description = 1 sentence.
data._doc_oneThing: The ONE highest-leverage action for this week. ≤80 chars, action verb first. Surfaced on home and tasks pages.
data._doc_projects: Projects for the current step. 6–8 per step total. Each: n (rank), title (≤4 words), why (1 sentence), goal (1 sentence with numeric target), outcome (1 sentence), status ('current' | 'later' | 'done'), step (sub_id like '2.1'). 2–3 marked as `current` to actively work on; rest are `later` until promoted.
data._doc_tasks: Concrete tasks for this week. Fields: id (int, unique), text (≤80 chars), done (bool), today (bool — pinned to today), project (matches projects[*].title), date ('today'|'this week'|ISO), dateTone ('today'|'week'). New tasks: increment max id by 1.
data._doc_kpis: Phase-exit metrics. rows: metric (≤24 chars), current (string with unit), target (string with unit), status ('red'|'amber'|'green'). 3–5 rows max.
data._doc_doNotDo: Anti-priorities — things explicitly NOT to do right now (rendered as "Don't do yet" on home.json). 2–4 short imperatives (≤6 words).
data._doc_roadmap: Phase tree. currentSubphase = id of the sub where `here: true`. INVARIANT: exactly one sub across all phases has `here: true`. Mutate by flipping `here` (off the old, on the new); never edit currentFocus directly — it is derived. badge = optional pill rendered next to the roadmap title (e.g. 'First version' during onboarding). Set to null to hide.
